name: priceprovider.admin:PriceRow[priceType=='SALES_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_BASE_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_DAILY_RATE']:read
description: Read sales and rental price rows (excluding purchase prices and material costs)

name: priceprovider.admin:PriceRow[NOT priceType=='PURCHASE_PRICE' AND NOT priceType=='MATERIAL_COST']:read
description: Read all price rows except purchase prices and material costs

name: priceprovider.admin:PriceRow[groupRefs isEmpty]:read
description: Read price rows without group assignment (public prices)

name: priceprovider.admin:PriceRow[groupRefs isEmpty AND (priceType=='SALES_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_BASE_PRICE' OR priceType=='RENTAL_DAILY_RATE')]:read
description: Read public sales and rental prices (for anonymous users)
